dialog1.1:
1. The skeleton is  known as the…?
               a. Framework
                b. Protector
                c.  Coordinator
                d. Breathing
dialog1.2:
2. The skin is part of what type of organs?
                a. Skeletal
                b. Respiratory
                c. Integumentary
                d. Digestive
dialog1.3:
3.  These organs help you receive the 5 senses.
                a. Integumentary
                b. Nervous
                c. Digestive
                d. Respiratory
dialog1.4:
4. [Bonus (If you answer this correctly, you earn the “Super organ hero achievement”)]
  Note: Bonus questions are not part of the topic but related to the topic  
                a. 12
                b. 13
                c. 11
                d. 10
dialog1.5:
5. Digestive is used for..?
                a. Eating, drinking
                b. Breathing
                c. Taking a poo on the toilet
                d. Protection

dialog2.1: 1.The Nervous system is “the only thing” that helps with communicating.
dialog2.3: 3.The “nervous” system is not a reliable way for communication. It's only used for body protection.

dialog_ans1.correct: You are correct! You can now move on to the next question!
dialog_ans1.incorrect1: You are incorrect! You have one more chance
